archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) mixed with Editorial Typography
vibe: Editorial, Warm, Human, Sharp. Avoids 'AI-slop', dark-dense UI, and generic rounded tech aesthetics.
global_rules: No Inter, Roboto, or standard tech fonts for headings.
No purple-blue gradients or generic Vercel-style card grids.
No massive drop shadows. Use 1px sharp borders and flat solid backgrounds.
Every interactive or informational element MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="kanban-column-ongoing"`).
Bento grid for dashboard with asymmetric spacing and strict alignment.

grid_strategy.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Use col-span-2 or col-span-3 for main charts to break symmetry.

surfaces_and_components.cards: bg-white border border-[#E5E2DC] shadow-none rounded-sm. No hover lift, just border color change to #1C1917 on interactive cards.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D95A40] text-white hover:bg-[#C24930] rounded-none px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-stone-900 border border-stone-900 hover:bg-stone-100 rounded-none px-6 py-2.5 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-stone-600 hover:text-stone-900 hover:bg-stone-100 rounded-none transition-colors

surfaces_and_components.tabs: Border-bottom style only. Active tab has border-b-2 border-stone-900 text-stone-900. Inactive tabs are border-b-2 border-transparent text-stone-500. Avoid generic gray pill backgrounds.
surfaces_and_components.inputs: bg-white border-b border-stone-300 rounded-none px-0 py-2 focus:ring-0 focus:border-stone-900 transition-colors. (Minimalist line style preferred over full boxes if applicable, else sharp rectangular boxes).
surfaces_and_components.kanban_columns: border-r border-[#E5E2DC] last:border-r-0 px-4 min-h-[70vh] bg-[#FDFBF7]

interactions.hover: Backgrounds shift to surface_hover (#F5F3EF), borders darken. Avoid over-animated transforms.
interactions.animations: Subtle opacity fades on state change (150ms ease-in-out). No bouncy spring animations.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts 'Cormorant Garamond', 'Work Sans', and 'IBM Plex Mono' in index.css.
The UI should feel like a high-end print magazine applied to a CRM. Use generous whitespace.
Do not use generic Shadcn soft cards. If using Shadcn components, override borders to 1px sharp `#E5E2DC`, shadows to none, and radius to `sm` or `none`.
For the Heatmap, use varying opacities of the accent color (#D95A40).
For the AI '+ Log' extraction text area, use an editorial mono-spaced block that feels raw and immediate.
Ensure the dashboard uses standard Recharts but customize strokes and fills to match the terracotta and olive palette.
Kanban board should not look like Jira. It should look like an elegant list of running conversations. Use the media avatars for contacts.
ALL interactive elements (tabs, log buttons, pipeline columns, specific table rows) MUST include `data-testid` attributes.
